creator: kick.christoph@googlemail.com
text:
Looks also nice to me! Thank you very much for patching it!


2010/8/26 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>

> Maintainer of devel/rubygem-rubygame,
>
> Please note that PR ports/150003 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150003
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
